name: palschema-hub
description: A public schema registry + browser + validator CLI for Palworld PalSchema mods.

scripts.seed: node scripts/derive-schemas.mjs 1.0 && node scripts/augment-from-sdk.mjs 1.0 && node scripts/derive-sdk-tables.mjs 1.0 && node scripts/build-index.mjs
scripts.cli:build: npm --prefix cli install && npm --prefix cli run build
